name: Israel
headline: Israel FLOOR CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical — Pattern continuation cycle following May 17 IDP-camp-strike anchor. UN cumulative confirmed: 75,811+ war deaths (73,770+ Palestinians). ICJ has ruled Israel must allow aid and meet basic needs; OCHA reports aid trucks at 50% offload rate (compliance partial). West Bank demolitions: 45 structures (5-11 May), 90% agricultural/livelihood/water/sanitation. Amnesty International investigation (May 2026) published on systematic high-rise destruction as war crimes of wanton destruction and collective punishment. No single May 18 event of higher severity than the May 17 IDP-camp-strike anchor. Pattern-continuation documentation only. Floor sustained at 0.0; no downward movement available.

AWR.rationale: Floor sustained. State recognition of harm continues to be denied or minimized; IDP-camp-strike pattern (May 17) extends without acknowledgment.

EMP.rationale: Floor sustained. Cumulative 75,811+ confirmed deaths. Aid obstruction at 50% offload rate (OCHA).

ACT.rationale: Floor sustained. Continued action without proportionality assessment despite ICJ binding orders.

EQU.rationale: Floor sustained. West Bank demolitions 90% targeting livelihood infrastructure (agricultural/water/sanitation) — patterned differential targeting documented.

BND.rationale: Floor sustained. Multiple IHL frameworks engaged; Amnesty's May 2026 designation of high-rise destruction as 'war crimes of wanton destruction and collective punishment' adds Tier-4 external accountability evidence.

ACC.rationale: Floor sustained. ICC arrest warrants outstanding; ICJ binding orders partially complied with (aid at 50%).

SYS.rationale: Floor sustained. Cumulative civilian-toll trajectory continues across all systems (housing, food, water, healthcare, education).

INT.rationale: Floor sustained. ICJ orders + ICC warrants + Amnesty war-crimes designation + UN confirmed casualty toll constitute Tier-5 evidence convergence; integrity-under-pressure threshold not met.

evidence.summary: UN News May 2026: cumulative war deaths confirmed at 75,811+ (73,770+ Palestinians).
OCHA HSU #290: aid trucks at 50% offload rate; ICJ binding aid-access orders partially complied with.
UN OCHA: 45 structures demolished in West Bank (5-11 May), 90% agricultural/livelihood/water/sanitation infrastructure.
Amnesty International May 2026: investigation on systematic high-rise destruction designates conduct as 'war crimes of wanton destruction and collective punishment.'
Carry-forward from May 17: Al Mawasi IDP-tent-strike pattern (96 killed overnight, 36 in IDP tents — parents/children together). Methodology category: IDP-camp-strike-pattern-establishing.

rationale: Pattern-continuation cycle following May 17 IDP-camp-strike anchor. No single May 18 event of higher severity. Floor sustained at 0.0; no downward movement available. Math: 8/8 = 1.0 → ((1.0-1)/4)*100 = 0.0.
